nasb.text: But as for Israel He says, “All the day long I have stretched out My hands to a disobedient and obstinate people.”

esv.text: But of Israel he says, “All day long I have held out my hands to a disobedient and contrary people.”

cnv.text: 論到以色列人，他卻說： “我整天向那悖逆頂嘴的子民伸開雙手。”

ccb.text: 至于以色列人，他说： “我整天伸出双手招呼那悖逆顽固的百姓。”

csbs.text: 但是关于以色列人，他却说：“我整天向那悖逆、顶嘴的子民伸出双手。”
